vllm.title: Remove einops from dependencies
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The Phi model is not using the package.

vllm.title: gqa added to mpt attn
vllm.author: megha95
vllm.bodyExcerpt: mpt.py modified to support GQA in MPTAttention

vllm.title: Unpack qzeros in kernel
vllm.author: vedantroy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The AWQ Triton kernel now unpacks the quantized zeroes inside of the Triton kernel.
This results in some performance improvements:
N = K = 4096

N = K = 768

To be honest, I don't understand a few things. Namely:

Why the current Triton kernel works at all, given that tl.view does not preserve order

vllm.title: Update Dockerfile to build Megablocks
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It turns out we need to build megablocks for multiple architecture. This PR involves a PR to megablocks (merged) and building the wheels so we can install it for the server.

vllm.title: Fix peak memory profiling
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, vLLM's memory usage easily exceeds the gpu_memory_utilization (90%) when TP > 1. I believe this is because the current memory profiling is not accurate when TP > 1. My guess is that some memory (probably related to NCCL?) is allocated/freed not through the PyTorch memory allocator.

vllm.title: Implement lazy model loader
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR lazily loads the model modules so that adding a new model with a new dependency does not affect other models. This is also useful for ROCm support, since we can isolate the models that only support NVIDIA GPUs (e.g., Mixtral as of now).
